# onlyShadows | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Graphics ](/documentation/coregraphics)

-  onlyShadows 

Type Property# onlyShadows

Mac CatalystmacOS

```
static var onlyShadows: CGWindowImageOption { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowimageoption/onlyshadows#Discussion)

When capturing the window, only the shadow effects are captured.

## [See Also](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowimageoption/onlyshadows#see-also)

### [Type Properties](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowimageoption/onlyshadows#Type-Properties)

[`static var bestResolution: CGWindowImageOption`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowimageoption/bestresolution)When capturing the window, return the best image resolution. The returned image size may be different than the screen size.[`static var boundsIgnoreFraming: CGWindowImageOption`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowimageoption/boundsignoreframing)[`static var nominalResolution: CGWindowImageOption`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowimageoption/nominalresolution)When capturing the window, return the nominal image resolution. The returned image size is the same as the screen size.[`static var shouldBeOpaque: CGWindowImageOption`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowimageoption/shouldbeopaque)
